title: Trimble Releases 2022 Sustainability Report
text: Latest Report Demonstrates Trimble's Continued Commitment to "Shaping a Sustainable Future" Through Building Resilience, Empowering People and Leading with Integrity WESTMINSTER, Colo. , Aug. 31, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Trimble (NASDAQ: TRMB) announced today the publication of its 2022 Sustainability Report, featuring progress and milestones as part of its sustainability strategy.

title: Dart Transit Selects Trimble Instinct and Video Intelligence Fleet Management Solutions for Improved Driver Experience and Safety
text: WESTMINSTER, Colo. , Aug. 30, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Trimble (NASDAQ: TRMB) announced today that Dart Transit Company, based in Eagan, Minn, has selected Trimble's Instinct driver experience and Video Intelligence fleet management solutions.

title: Expanded API Now Available for the Trimble Agriculture Cloud, Creating an Open Environment Benefiting Farmers and Their Partners
text: Expanded API Creates Additional Data Exchange Capabilities for Connected Devices WESTMINSTER, Colo. , Aug. 8, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Trimble (NASDAQ: TRMB) announced today the release of its flexible API for the Trimble Agriculture Cloud, an industry cloud that streamlines farming operations.

title: Synopsys Appoints Rob Painter to Board of Directors
text: SUNNYVALE, Calif. , Aug. 7, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Synopsys, Inc. (Nasdaq: SNPS) today announced the appointment of Rob Painter to its board of directors.

title: Trimble (TRMB) Q2 Earnings Beat Estimates, Revenues Up Y/Y

title: Trimble (TRMB) Reports Q2 Earnings: What Key Metrics Have to Say

title: Trimble Navigation (TRMB) Beats Q2 Earnings and Revenue Estimates
text: Trimble Navigation (TRMB) came out with quarterly earnings of $0.64 per share, beating the Zacks Consensus Estimate of $0.58 per share. This compares to earnings of $0.64 per share a year ago.

title: Trimble Announces Second Quarter 2023 Results
text: Record annualized recurring revenue of $1.88 billion, up 14 percent on an organic basis Second quarter total revenue of $994 million, up 6 percent on a year-over-year basis, up 3 percent year-over-year on an organic basis GAAP gross margin of 60.8 percent and non-GAAP gross margin of 64.2 percent WESTMINSTER, Colo. , Aug. 3, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Trimble Inc. (NASDAQ: TRMB) today announced financial results for the second quarter of 2023.
